title: Testing Object Collaborations and Contracts · Program Brief: Oop Invariant Tests
summary: Verify domain invariants, substitute implementations, event effects, persistence, and refactoring safety. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop invariant tests increment in a contract-tested object system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test constructor and mutation invariants across valid boundaries, invalid inputs, and unchanged-state failures.
Use state objects when behavior varies substantially by state and explicit transition logic outgrows simpler representations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
